name: workbench
description: Personal Claude Code plugins — cadence ecosystem and standalone tools

plugins.name: cadence
plugins.description: Context management framework — four-tier workflow router, daily rhythm, session capture, authoring methodology

plugins.name: cadence-groundwork
plugins.description: Episodic ground-breaking skills for new projects and Claude Code setup — scaffolding archetypes, license selection, marketplace and hooks setup, CI/CD pipeline setup, plugin and rules authoring. Enable when starting work, disable when done.

plugins.name: cadence-forge
plugins.description: Development workflow tools — logging, dependency vetting, release pipelines, diagrams, and project checks

plugins.name: cadence-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server development — architecture patterns, tools-as-code

plugins.name: cadence-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian plugin development and vault workflows — markdown, Bases, release automation

plugins.name: cadence-palette
plugins.description: Image generation toolkit — Gemini prompt engineering, composition specs, visual grammar

plugins.name: cadence-lab
plugins.description: Flair and experimental skills — macOS integrations, theming, tmux, MCP discovery

plugins.name: cadence-rules
plugins.description: How to work with code — language standards, security, quality, git, CI/CD, Docker, MCP, documentation

plugins.name: homebridge-dev
plugins.description: Homebridge plugin development — HAP mappings, accessory patterns, debugging

plugins.name: homelab
plugins.description: Homelab infrastructure context — Unraid server, media stack, Docker services

plugins.name: superpowers-chrome
plugins.description: Direct Chrome DevTools Protocol access — skill mode + MCP mode, zero dependencies

plugins.name: superpowers-developing-for-claude-code
plugins.description: Skills and docs for developing Claude Code plugins, skills, and MCP servers

plugins.name: double-shot-latte
plugins.description: Auto-continues Claude Code work instead of stopping to ask permission

plugins.name: cadence-guardrails
plugins.description: Git safety hooks: block pushes and gh writes to repos you don't own, branch warnings, commit nudges

plugins.name: agent-pool
plugins.description: Expert pool — delegate to domain specialists via mixture-of-experts routing, filesystem mail, and contract-driven coordination

plugins.name: cadence-voice
plugins.description: Communication and presence — prose craft and AI pattern detection, personal brand, data storytelling, competitor analysis, conflict resolution

plugins.name: cadence-discovery
plugins.description: Feature ideation pipeline — usage-grounded latent/divergent/adjacent discovery that produces one feature ready to hand off to cadence:attune

plugins.name: cadence-metrics
plugins.description: JSONL event logging for Claude Code sessions — cost-per-commit via PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks. Pure data collection, no UI.

plugins.name: artificer-design-system
plugins.description: Artificer — personal design system. AuDHD-optimized, dark-first, Jazz Age Deco palette. Tokens, live spec, framework adapters, and theme exports for Claude Code, Ghostty, VSCode, and Obsidian.
